DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB_TexSet Class Reference

A set of textures one for each "maintex","bump" that one or more materials use. These Will be baked into a rectangle in the atlas. More...

Public Attributes

MeshBakerMaterialTexture[] ts
 One per "maintex", "bump". Stores encapsulatingSamplingRect (can be different for maintex, bump...) Stores materialTiling for mapping materials to atlas rects and transforming UVs not for baking atlases.
 
MatsAndGOs matsAndGOs
 
int idealWidth_pix
 
int idealHeight_pix

Vector2 obUVoffset [get]
 
Vector2 obUVscale [get]
 

Detailed Description

A set of textures one for each "maintex","bump" that one or more materials use. These Will be baked into a rectangle in the atlas.

MeshBakerMaterialTexture [] DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB_TexSet.ts

One per "maintex", "bump". Stores encapsulatingSamplingRect (can be different for maintex, bump...) Stores materialTiling for mapping materials to atlas rects and transforming UVs not for baking atlases.
